title: stilbaceae
intro: The Stilbaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the 'thread-purslanes'. This family consists of a small group of plants that are primarily found in southern Africa, with some species also occurring in other parts of the world. Members of the Stilbaceae family are typically herbaceous plants with small, white or pink flowers, and are often found in well-drained soils in dry to moist environments. The plants within this family are relatively rare and are often considered to be of limited interest to gardeners, but are of value in scientific and botanical research.
